All seals are manufactured with maximum precision and allow working even at high pressure. The extractor is equipped with a venting system that equalizes the pressure under the piston, ensuring smooth and efficient operation. The semi-transparent cylinder makes it easy to check the quantity and condition of the liquid. The advantage is the use of a Made in Japan spoon in the dishwasher and in the microwave. items.raw_desc: Autószerelő szerszám COMPASS szivattyútömlő 13 mm × 200 cm:                    Key features of the COMPASS Auto Mechanics Tool, Pumping Hose, 13 mm × 200 cmSelf-priming hose for transferring liquids, e.g. pumping fuel or draining waterThe self-priming hose works on the principle of gravity, the flow of liquids by self-primingThe hose is fitted with a metal end acting as a non-return valveThe end is fitted with a ball to prevent backflow of liquidsMaterial:PVCInstructions for use: Before starting the liquid transfer, the end of the hose should be placed in the container where the liquid is to be transferred, this container should always be placed lower than the level of the liquid to be pumped. The end of the hose fitted with the valve is placed in the container with the pumped liquid and the tip of the hose is dipped into the pumped liquid several times. In this way, the hose is gradually filled and the liquid then flows arbitrarily. The flow will be terminated by pulling out the intake section.
